title: ReviewResult
description: Output of an LLM review operation (rebar.llm, e.g. `rebar review <id> <reviewer>`). The load-bearing field is `findings` (an array of `finding`); everything else is provenance about what was reviewed, which reviewers ran, and which backend/model/trace produced it. Emitted by the CLI/library `--output json` path; the MCP `review_ticket` tool returns the same shape as a plain dict but advertises no outputSchema (it makes a live LLM call and is a documented NO_SCHEMA_EXEMPT).

runner.description: Execution backend that produced this result: 'langgraph', 'deepagents', 'fake', …

model.description: Model id used (when applicable; null for non-LLM/fake runners).

trace_id.description: Langfuse trace id, when tracing is enabled; null otherwise.

summary.description: Optional reviewer-written summary of the review.
